lines.speaker: Khorvak, a dwarven engineer
lines.text: Ooooh, heeellooo! Anyshing a bright dwarf like me can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The only thing you can help me with is finding the nearest place to get a drink, I think...

lines.speaker: Khorvak, a dwarven engineer
lines.text: That ish shimple! Help yourshelf to the dwarvern shtout! I mean dwarfen! I mean...

lines.speaker: Khorvak, a dwarven engineer
lines.text: I'm not shure what I mean.
